diagrams.title: Basic ER Diagram Symbols
diagrams.description: Shows all standard symbols used in ER diagrams for entities, attributes, and relationships
diagrams.purpose: Learn standard notation conventions used in ER modeling

diagrams.title: Cardinality Notation Types
diagrams.description: Illustrates different ways to represent cardinality (1:1, 1:M, M:N) in ER diagrams
diagrams.purpose: Understand how to show relationship cardinality visually

diagrams.title: Participation Constraints
diagrams.description: Shows total (mandatory) vs partial (optional) participation using single and double lines
diagrams.purpose: Distinguish between mandatory and optional relationships

diagrams.title: Weak Entity ER Diagram
diagrams.description: Example showing how weak entity (Dependent) relates to strong entity (Employee)
elements: Employee entity with primary key Emp_ID
diagrams.purpose: Understand weak entity identification and representation
